name: components/select
description: A dropdown selection control that allows users to pick one or more options from a predefined list. Provides a complete composition system with Select, SelectValue, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectListbox, SelectItem, SelectItemLabel, SelectItemIndicator, SelectSection, SelectLabel, SelectDescription, SelectErrorMessage, SelectHiddenSelect, and SelectPortal. Supports single and multi-selection, item grouping, placeholder text, clear-button integration, and full keyboard navigation. Built on Kobalte Select with ARIA listbox semantics.
useCases: Country, language, or timezone selectors in user-profile and settings forms
Status or priority dropdowns in task-management and issue-tracking interfaces
Multi-select category tags in content-management systems and e-commerce admin panels
Sort-order and page-size controls in data-table toolbars and pagination headers
usage: import { Select, SelectValue, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectListbox, SelectItem, SelectItemLabel, SelectItemIndicator, SelectSection, SelectLabel, SelectDescription, SelectErrorMessage, SelectHiddenSelect, SelectPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/select"
